query:

SET password = '$2b$10$gNo54bQjtVOHyxH6XcQPUufzx73bUxGfH/hnu3PdfDYaGq4kPUT22'
WHERE email IN ('test.ogrenci1@gmail.com', 'test.ogrenci2@gmail.com', 'test.ogrenci3@gmail.com', 'test.mentor@gmail.com');
